title: ceropegia ringens
intro: Ceropegia ringens, also known as the chain-stemmed ceropegia or devil's climbing, is a flowering succulent native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceropegia ringens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of the plant involve making teas or infusions from its roots and leaves, which are said to be effective in treating various ailments.
